ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Description of the size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US sizing equivalent for the size */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* EU sizing equivalent for the size */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* UK sizing equivalent for the size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is intended (e.g., male, female, unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the size is intended (e.g., adult, child) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "chest_cm" TEXT /* Chest measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "chest_in" TEXT /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "waist_in" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip_cm" TEXT /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip_in" TEXT /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_cm" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_in" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "length_cm" TEXT /* Length measurement in centimeters */,
  "length_in" TEXT /* Length measurement in inches */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used for the size measurement (e.g., cotton, polyester) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., shirts, pants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material(s) used in the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color(s) available for the product */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart for the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size associated with the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in this size */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., store, warehouse) */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the stock level falls below the threshold */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of the next reorder */,
  "last_checked_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last checked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sold product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the sale */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discount applied to the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discounts ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the discount applies to */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage discount to be applied */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  "minimum_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity required to apply the discount */,
  "maximum_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity eligible for the discount */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the discount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, staff) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the supplier was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the supplier information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "product_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-supplier relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product-supplier relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product-supplier relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Warehouse A) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for managing the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
